title: Clockwork: Retextured Simple
description: A  retextured resource pack of clockwork's items+blocks I think look better and consistent with minecraft's style as well create mod.
body:
A retextured resource pack of clockwork's items+blocks for those in favor of consistency and good looking textures similiar to minecraft's style as well as the create mod. Plus glue is brought back!

This resource pack is for clockwork's 1.20.1 version.
